name: watch-listing
description: Modular watch listing pipeline for Vardalux Collections

tools.name: run_pipeline
tools.description: Run the watch listing pipeline. Pass a listing folder path to process, or --scan to discover new/incomplete listings. This is the primary entry point — it manages all step sequencing, resume logic, and tool dispatch internally.

args.description: Absolute path to a listing folder (e.g. /path/to/Tudor/272CV-M79230B-0008), or --scan to discover new listings

tools.name: run_pricing
tools.description: Calculate all platform prices from _draft.json. Pure math — eBay, Chrono24, Facebook, WTA, Reddit, Grailzee.

tools.name: run_char_subs
tools.description: Apply Facebook character substitutions to listing text. Only needed for facebook_retail and facebook_wholesale.

tools.name: run_checklist
tools.description: Generate posting checklist from completed _draft.json. Price-based and brand-based platform selection.

tools.name: run_phase_b
tools.description: Assemble all platform listings from canonical description + pricing. Produces _Listing.md.

tools.name: run_grailzee_gate
tools.description: Evaluate whether listing qualifies for Grailzee. Fetches median data, compares to pricing.

tools.name: generate_listing_pdf
tools.description: Generate a clean formatted PDF from a watch listing markdown file.

folder_or_md_path.description: Absolute path to the listing folder or .md file
